hero.secondary: Describe your pet's needs to us, and we will call you back promptly with initial advice and a free quote.
hero.primary: Let's talk about your pet's needs.

formulaire.confidentialite: Your data and your pet's information remain confidential and are only used to process your request.
formulaire.message_suggestion: Please specify your address, your pet's name, breed, and age, etc...

toast.succes: Request sent! We will get back to you within 48 hours at the latest.
toast.erreur_resend: Error sending request. We apologize. Please send us an email directly.
toast.erreur_reseau: Network error. The request could not be sent. Please check your internet connection.
